calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is granted.

Proposed order and proposed judgment submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Continued To Mar-04-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Ryan P. Cardona, Esq. of Brodsky Smith, Tel. 877.534.2590, appearing for Plaintiff Precila Balabbo;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

This matter is contested. Mr. Cardona appears to request a two-week continuance to allow time for the parties to finalize a minor change to the language in the consent judgment.

The Court inquired as to why the parties did not reach out to the Court prior to today's hearing for a continuance. Mr. Cardona responded and apologized to the Court for the late continuance request.

At the conclusion of Mr. Cardona comments, the Court ordered Plaintiff's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment off calendar.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: C. Loke. (301/RCE)
